pricing_tier.quote_span: License fees are tiered based on the number of active named licenses, denominated in Euros: 1 to 200 licenses: EUR 65.00 per license per month; 201 to 750 licenses: EUR 54.00 per license per month; 751 to 1,500 licenses: EUR 46.00 per license per month
pricing_tier.annotation_note: Non-USD currency case. Tests whether the extractor correctly populates the currency field as EUR instead of defaulting to USD.

renewal_term.quote_span: This SOW is effective for twelve (12) months from the date last signed and does not include a renewal mechanism; a successor SOW must be executed for continued use.

msa_sow_linkage.quote_span: This Statement of Work is issued under and governed by the Master Framework Agreement dated November 20, 2025
